name: Inside-Outside feet switching
description: Extend the inside-outside pattern by moving your foot between zones, combining ball travel with precise touch alternation.

name: Inside-Outside
description: Shift the ball laterally using the inside and outside of the same foot in a steady rhythm. Foundation drill for developing touch variety.

name: Sole Roll — Forward & Back
description: Roll the ball from the centre to the top of the mat and back using the sole of your foot. A slow, controlled drill to build confidence with sole contact.

name: Step-Overs
description: Feint over the ball with one foot, then use the other foot's outside touch to push it away and inside touch to bring it back.

name: Toe Taps
description: Alternate tapping the ball with each foot to build touch sensitivity and rhythm. The ideal first drill for players new to the mat.

name: V-Pull
description: Roll the ball back from the top of the mat with your sole, then redirect it with an outside touch. Builds drag-and-push ball mastery.
